summary: Iteration 9 testing complete - All 9 backend tests passed, frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: Object Storage upload/download with image compression, GET /api/permissions returns updated structure, GET /api/hr/alerts works, HR CRUD operations work, HR salary with deductions works, Sidebar shows 'الفواتير والعهدة', Invoices page project filter shows 'جميع المشاريع' for ALL users.

minor.issue: Image compression targets 30KB but may result in slightly larger files (36-37KB) for complex images with random noise. Compression ratio is still >98%.

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/storage/upload correctly uploads files and returns file_id and storage_path
Image compression uses Pillow to resize to max 800px and compress JPEG quality until close to 30KB target
GET /api/permissions returns hr_management in 'الموارد البشرية' group
GET /api/permissions returns invoices with label 'الفواتير والعهدة'
GET /api/hr/alerts returns alerts for expiring إقامة, تأمين, and عقود
HR Employee CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) all work correctly
HR Salary with deduction_type and deduction_amount fields work correctly
Sidebar shows 'الفواتير والعهدة' for invoices link
Invoices page project filter has 'جميع المشاريع' as first option for ALL users (not just admin)
Admin sidebar projects go to /connections-hub (hasPermission returns true for admin)
seed_data_creation: Test employees/salaries created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully tested. Object Storage at POST /api/storage/upload accepts multipart file upload, compresses images >30KB using Pillow (resize to 800px max, JPEG quality reduction). GET /api/storage/files/{path} downloads files. HR alerts endpoint returns expiring documents. Invoices.js line 465 has {<option value=''>جميع المشاريع</option>} for all users. Sidebar hasPermission() returns true for admin, so admin projects go to /connections-hub.

tests_performed.details: invoices label='الفواتير والعهدة', hr_management group='الموارد البشرية'
Create, Read, Update, Delete all work

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Invoices page has 'جميع المشاريع' option
tests_performed.details: First option in project filter dropdown
Shows شؤون الموظفين header, tabs, alerts, employee table
Shows expiring إقامة, تأمين, عقد alerts
